name: ppt-generate
description: Generate editable PPTX presentations with PptxGenJS and validate them through WPS PDF rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and visually validate editable PPTX decks
interface.longDescription: PPTX Generate uses PptxGenJS to create editable presentations, WPS Presentation to export high-fidelity QA PDFs, and PDF.js to create visual previews before publishing.
